details.test: Task 1: Add stainless transom davit (>=300 kg, <=1500) to cart
Task 2: Compare first two davits by weight and add lighter to cart
Task 3: Build 3-item davit kit with free-shipping filters and budget check
Task 4: Search, add two units, and apply promo code
Task 5: Book installation for 30–40 ft boat, weekday afternoon next month
Task 6: Use configurator and save first recommended package to wishlist
Task 7: Save DL-300-SS installation manual to document library
Task 8: Compare two davits by rating and add two units of higher-rated to cart
Task 9: Submit sales inquiry for custom catamaran davit solution
